name: OAC Bridge
description: OpenAvatarChat bridge: exposes agent tools and provides OAC as an IM channel

callbackUrl.description: HTTP URL for delivering OC replies back to OAC (e.g. http://localhost:8011/oc-reply)

token.description: Shared secret token for webhook authentication between OAC and OC

webhookPath.description: HTTP path for the inbound webhook (default: /oac-bridge/webhook)
